title: False Comfort
primary_mechanism: valid but stale or wrongly scoped supplier assertion

title: False Comfort — Scope-Matched Negative Control
primary_mechanism: matched supplier scope with no local applicability evidence

title: Operational Outlier — Counterfactual Lower-Impact Control
primary_mechanism: matched source evidence with only asset criticality and deployment scope lowered

title: Operation MidnightEclipse public chronology
primary_mechanism: publication-aware public evidence chronology and evidence-boundary enforcement

title: Rapid Pivot — Early Resolution Control
primary_mechanism: matched evidence with uncertainty resolved before tau_E

title: Operation MidnightEclipse synthetic reference deployment
primary_mechanism: public chronology plus explicitly synthetic organisation-local context

title: Matched Controlled Scenario Baseline Suite
primary_mechanism: controlled comparison of orchestration against a structured un-orchestrated PSIRT worksheet proxy
